_instructions: Add these 3 nodes into your existing CAPTURE workflow. Place them AFTER your 'Save to Supabase' node. The Code node reads the item id from the save step, OpenAI generates the summary, then the Supabase node writes it back. Reconnect whatever came after 'Save to Supabase' to continue after the last node here.

values.content:
You are a summariser for a social recommendation app. Given a title and optional description, return ONLY a 5–10 word punchy summary that describes what this saved item is about. No punctuation at the end. No quotes. Examples:
- "Amazing rooftop bar with city views"
- "Best ramen in Tokyo near Shinjuku"
- "Hidden beach perfect for sunset picnics"
- "Fast reliable accountant for small business"

_note: After 'Save Summary to Supabase', reconnect to whatever node came after 'Save to Supabase' in your original flow (e.g. Send Notification, Webhook Response, etc). Also check the Code node — if your upstream Supabase save node has a different name, update '$('Save to Supabase')' to match.
